Step: Tap the "USB" source button on the Audio screen
Expected Result: USB source is selected and the media player interface is displayed

Step: Verify a track list or "Now Playing" screen appears with track information
Expected Result: Track name and/or artist info is displayed on screen

Step: Tap the "Play" button if the track is not already playing
Expected Result: The track begins playback; a progress bar or elapsed time indicator starts moving

Step: Verify the elapsed time is advancing (playback is active)
Expected Result: The time indicator increments confirming audio playback
The next track in the list begins playing; track name updates

Step: Verify the track name has changed to a new track
Expected Result: A different track name is now displayed
The player returns to the previous track or restarts the current track
Playback pauses; the elapsed time stops advancing

Step: Verify the elapsed time has stopped and the Pause/Play button shows "Play" state
Expected Result: The time indicator is frozen and the button indicates paused state

Step: Tap the "Play" button to resume playback
Expected Result: Playback resumes from where it was paused; elapsed time advances again
